name: Swayambhunath Stupa
description: Ancient religious architecture atop a hill in the Kathmandu Valley. often referred to as the Monkey Temple.

name: Kathmandu Durbar Square
description: Historic seat of Nepalese royalty, featuring stunning Newari architecture and ancient temples.

name: Patan Durbar Square
description: Renowned for its heritage of fine arts and classical Nepalese architecture.

name: Bhaktapur Durbar Square
description: The plaza in front of the royal palace of the old Bhaktapur Kingdom.

name: Lumbini
description: The birthplace of Siddhartha Gautama, the Lord Buddha.

name: Gorkha Durbar
description: The ancestral palace of the Shah dynasty built in the 16th century.

name: Nuwakot Palace
description: Historic seven-story palace built by Prithvi Narayan Shah.

name: Janaki Mandir
description: Hindu temple dedicated to Goddess Sita, stunning Mughal architecture.

name: Tansen Durbar
description: Ancient palace in the hills of Palpa.

name: Changunarayan Temple
description: The oldest Hindu temple in use in the Kathmandu Valley.

name: Kirtipur Historic City
description: Ancient Newar township with rich history and classic streets.

name: Sindhuli Gadhi
description: Historical fort where Gurkha soldiers defeated the British.

name: Amar Narayan Temple
description: Historic wooden temple in Tansen.

name: Rani Mahal
description: Often called the Taj Mahal of Nepal, situated by the Kali Gandaki river.

name: Panauti Durbar
description: Ancient square in the preserved Newari town of Panauti.

name: Pashupatinath Temple
description: One of the most sacred Hindu temples of Nepal, on the banks of Bagmati.

name: Muktinath Temple
description: A sacred place for both Hindus and Buddhists in Mustang.

name: Manakamana Temple
description: Sacred place of the Hindu Goddess Bhagwati, an incarnation of Parvati.

name: Gosainkunda Lake
description: Alpine freshwater oligotrophic lake, sacred in Hinduism.

name: Boudhanath Stupa
description: One of the largest spherical stupas in Nepal, and a center of Tibetan Buddhism.

name: Pathibhara Devi
description: Highly revered shrine in eastern Nepal.

name: Budhanilkantha
description: Large statue of sleeping Lord Vishnu carved from a single floating stone.

name: Dakshinkali Temple
description: Dedicated to the goddess Kali, located in the south of Kathmandu.

name: Devghat Dham
description: Holistic center situated at the junction of Seti and Krishna Gandaki rivers.

name: Tengboche Monastery
description: Tibetan Buddhist monastery in the Khumbu valley.

name: Shivapuri Nagarjun National Park
description: Protected area offering great nature trails and a quick escape from the city.

name: Annapurna Base Camp Trek
description: Legendary trekking route offering amphitheater views of the Himalayas.

name: Everest Base Camp
description: The iconic trek to the foot of the worlds highest mountain.

name: Langtang Valley Trek
description: Beautiful valley known as the valley of glaciers.

name: Chitwan National Park
description: Dense forests offering elephant safaris and rhino spotting.

name: Bardiya National Park
description: Pristine conservation area famous for Bengal Tigers.

name: Poon Hill Trek
description: Short trek featuring incredible sunrise views over the Annapurna range.

name: Rara Lake
description: The largest fresh water lake in the Nepalese Himalayas.

name: Phoksundo Lake
description: Alpine fresh water oligotrophic lake in Shey Phoksundo National Park.

name: Koshi Tappu Wildlife Reserve
description: Famous for bird watching and the wild water buffalo.

name: Makalu Barun National Park
description: Remote national park with profound elevations and deep gorges.

name: Khaptad National Park
description: A hidden gem in the far west offering rolling green hills and peace.

name: Helambu Trek
description: Accessible trekking region known for sweet apples and Buddhist culture.

name: Manaslu Circuit
description: Geographically spectacular and culturally fascinating mountain trek.

name: Mardi Himal Trek
description: A newly opened route offering stunning views of Machhapuchhre.

name: Nagarkot Viewpoint
description: Village renowned for sunrise views of the Himalayas including Mount Everest.

name: Sarangkot
description: Famed for panoramic views of Annapurna, Dhaulagiri, and Machhapuchhre.

name: Kala Patthar
description: Offers the most accessible closeup view of Everest.

name: Chandragiri Hills
description: Cable car destination offering sweeping views of Kathmandu Valley.

name: Kakani
description: A quiet hill station offering views of the Ganesh Himal range.

name: Bandipur
description: Preserved Newari town with stunning views of the Marsyangdi valley architecture.

name: Dhulikhel Viewpoint
description: Old Newari town offering excellent panoramic views of the snowy ranges.

name: Phulchowki
description: The highest hill in the Kathmandu Valley, great for hiking and bird watching.

name: Gokyo Ri
description: A peak offering a panoramic view of Everest and surrounding mountains.

name: World Peace Pagoda Pokhara
description: Massive Buddhist stupa on Ananda hill overlooking Phewa Lake.

name: Tsum Valley
description: A sacred Himalayan pilgrimage valley with ancient art and culture.

name: Khopra Ridge
description: Off-the-beaten-path viewpoint facing Mount Dhaulagiri.

name: Ilam Tea Gardens
description: Lush green tea estates rolling over the hills of eastern Nepal.

name: Namche Bazaar
description: The gateway to the high Himalayas and Everest region.

name: Daman View Tower
description: Offers the greatest unhindered view of the Himalayas from Dhaulagiri to Everest.

name: Godawari Botanical Garden
description: Lush gardens at the foot of Phulchowki hill, perfect for family picnics.

name: Tribhuvan Park
description: Large municipal park at Thankot, highly popular for weekend picnics.

name: Kakani Picnic Spot
description: Scenic picnic areas overlooking the central Himalayan ranges.

name: Taudaha Lake
description: Peaceful lake area on the outskirts of Kathmandu, great for relaxing.

name: Surya Chaur
description: Beautiful grassy hill north of Kathmandu offering stunning mountain vistas.

name: Bhotechaur Tea Garden
description: Known as "Mini Ilam", small tea estate perfect for photos and picnics.

name: Sundarijal
description: Forest river streams and waterfalls, a classic getaway spot.

name: Panchakanya Park
description: Lovely green space in Dharan, eastern Nepal.

name: Begnas Lake
description: Quiet and serene lake in Pokhara, less crowded than Phewa.

name: Chobhar Gorge
description: Historical gorge with picnic facilities and Jal Binayak temple nearby.

name: Shivapuri Cycling Trail
description: Challenging uphill mountain biking trails through dense forest.

name: Mustang Offroad Route
description: World-renowned arid valley trails specifically for 4x4 and adventure bikes.

name: Changu Narayan MTB Trail
description: Technical downhill and cross-country flow trails.

name: Pathilaya to Hetauda Highway
description: A beloved stretching route famous among long-distance road cyclists.

name: Manang Valley Dirt Road
description: Extreme offroading along the Marshyangdi river cliffs.

name: Lubhu to Lele Trail
description: Serene village roads perfect for weekend mountain biking.

name: Kalinchowk 4x4 Trail
description: Steep snow-covered dirt roads making for intense off-road drives in winter.

name: Pharping to Kulekhani
description: Long dirt and gravel climbs suitable for endurance cyclists.

name: Ramechhap Ridge Ride
description: Enduro bike trail offering scenic ridges and tough descents.

name: Hattiban Downhill
description: Dedicated downhill mountain biking track with jumps and berms.

name: Mount Everest (Sagarmatha)
description: The highest mountain peak in the world.

name: Machhapuchhre (Fishtail)
description: Iconic virgin peak dominating the Pokhara skyline.

name: Annapurna Massif
description: Spectacular mountain range featuring several peaks over 7,000m.

name: Ama Dablam
description: Considered one of the most beautiful mountains in the Himalayas.

name: Dhaulagiri
description: The seventh highest mountain in the world.

name: Upper Mustang Scenery
description: Desert-like arid landscapes contrasting with white snow peaks.

name: Khaptad Scenery
description: Meadows and rolling green hills providing tranquil scenic beauty.

name: Gokyo Lakes
description: World's highest freshwater lake system with turquoise waters.

name: Sankhuwasabha Cloud Forest
description: Dense rhododendron forests covered in mystical fog.

name: Manaslu Base Camp
description: Awe-inspiring views beneath the eighth highest mountain.

name: Thamel Tourist Hub
description: Kathmandu's main spot for booking treks, tours, and expeditions.

name: Pokhara Lakeside Info Center
description: Central hub for Annapurna conservation permits and guides.

name: NTB Tourist Board
description: Official Nepal Tourism Board office in Kathmandu.

name: Lukla Guide Bureau
description: For hiring guides and porters right after landing in the Everest region.

name: Chitwan Safari Agencies
description: Sauraha is packed with agencies booking jungle safaris.

name: Mustang Permit Office
description: Required office for crossing into the restricted Upper Mustang area.

name: Bandipur Tourism Council
description: Helpful local center for arranging homestays and tours.

name: Lumbini Development Trust
description: Provides maps and guides for the holy birthplace.

name: Namche Visitor Center
description: Sagarmatha National Park museum and information desk.

name: Tansen Tourist Office
description: Local municipality guide booking setup in Palpa.

name: Ilam Tourist Kiosk
description: Information desk for navigating the tea estates.

name: Bardia National Park Info
description: Headquarters for securing tiger tracking guides.

name: Langtang Park Checkpoint
description: Must-stop agency checkpoint at Dhunche for valley trekkers.

name: Gorkha Museum Guides
description: For historical tours regarding the unification of Nepal.

name: Janakpur Pilgrimage Center
description: Arranges guides for exploring the various religious ponds and temples.

name: Yak & Yeti Hotel
description: Luxury hotel in the heart of Kathmandu.

name: Nepal Airlines Ticketing
description: Official flight ticketing office.
promotionalMessage: Book scenic mountain flights directly with us.

name: Himalayan Guides Team
description: Certified mountain guides for your trek.
promotionalMessage: Safe and guided tours to EBC and Annapurna.

name: Thamel House Restaurant
description: Authentic Nepali dining experience.
promotionalMessage: Experience traditional Nepali thali with live cultural dance!
